_comment: Curated OSS SEO and content marketing repositories from GitHub research (71 + 70 tool-use deep crawl, June 2026). These repos document methodologies and algorithms; they are reference material for how competitor-scan, topical-authority-map, long-tail-expand, and serp-feature-check should work. Not a list of tools to install — a knowledge base of proven techniques.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: 100+ Python SEO tools including Topical Map Generator (GPT-4o), SERP Clustering at Scale, Content Hub Classification, Content Gap Finder, PAA Scraper, Trends Forecasting
methodology_references.key_algorithm: SERP-URL-overlap clustering — group keywords by which URLs co-appear in top-10 results rather than by semantic similarity. Reflects Google's actual intent-matching, not linguistic proximity.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Gold standard reference for topical-authority-map. The SERP overlap method should be the primary cluster detection technique when web-intel retrieval is available.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: 11 Claude Code skills + 2 agents: Weighted Jaccard + Louvain SERP clustering, PAA Miner, Featured Snippet Hunter, SERP-based intent classifier
methodology_references.key_algorithm: Weighted Jaccard similarity + Louvain community detection for SERP-URL-overlap clustering. More technically rigorous than simple URL-overlap; groups keywords into distinct topical communities that reflect Google's clustering.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Implementation reference for competitor-analysis and serp-feature-check atoms. Louvain community detection is the most reliable algorithm for keyword cluster identification.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: 21-command Claude Code suite: Hub/Hero/Help model, DataForSEO live keyword integration, 4-agent competitor analysis, dual-ranking strategy, VideoObject schema companion posts
methodology_references.key_algorithm: Dual-ranking strategy — YouTube video + VideoObject schema companion blog post = simultaneous YouTube Search + Google Search ranking. BrightEdge 2025 data: 53% improved Google ranking for blog posts with YouTube embeds.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Direct reference for the GEO/AEO section of seo-intelligence-engine.md and the geo-optimize atom. The companion blog post strategy is the highest-ROI single addition for new channels.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: 14-skill Claude Code suite: 5 hook variant generators with drop-off risk ratings, seasonal CPM calendar, Shorts optimization
methodology_references.key_algorithm: 5 hook variant types: question, curiosity gap, bold claim, transformation preview, pattern interrupt. Each variant carries a drop-off risk rating based on retention curve analysis.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Reference for hook-write atom. The 5-variant taxonomy + drop-off risk rating is a more principled approach than the current atom's single hook generation.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: 7 tools: PAA Tree Builder, Trends Breakout Analyzer, SERP Similarity Matrix (Jaccard), AI Overview Monitor
methodology_references.key_algorithm: PAA recursive expansion generates 324+ question-based variants from a single seed keyword at depth 4. Each question is a potential video title with documented search demand.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Reference for long-tail-expand atom's PAA tree traversal method. The 4-level depth limit and volume-per-level analysis should inform the atom's depth-2 traversal design.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: 11 skills: semantic-gap-analysis (Koray Tugberk topical authority methodology), topic-cluster-planning, featured-snippet-optimizer, E-E-A-T audit
methodology_references.key_algorithm: Koray Tugberk topical authority model: content depth + entity coverage + internal linking = topical authority score. Differs from hub-and-cluster by explicitly tracking entity coverage gaps.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Reference for the topical authority model in seo-intelligence-engine.md. The entity gap tracking is already reflected in the entity-extract atom design.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: Unofficial Google Trends API wrapper. gprop='youtube' parameter for YouTube-specific trend data. Seasonal pattern detection across 4 time windows.
methodology_references.key_algorithm: Breakout keyword detection: a keyword showing >5000% growth (reported as 'Breakout') in the 7D or 3M window signals emerging search demand before it appears in autocomplete tools.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Reference for trend-check atom when estimating keyword momentum. Volume estimates via Trends should always be labeled [estimated, unverified] per no-fabrication.md.
methodology_references.note: Unofficial API — usage may violate Google ToS. Use with caution and only for internal research, not for production data pipelines.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: PAA recursive expansion to depth 4. Generates 324+ questions from a single seed. pip-installable.
methodology_references.key_algorithm: PAA tree: 5 first-level questions from seed → click each for 4 more → depth 2 = up to 25 questions → depth 4 = up to 325. Each question has a Google-verified search demand signal.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Quantifies the PAA expansion methodology currently described in seo-intelligence-engine.md. At depth 2 (the current atom limit), the expected output is 5 to 25 questions per seed keyword.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: SERP-URL-overlap cluster detection. Reverse-engineers Google's topical groupings by analyzing which URLs appear together across a keyword set.
methodology_references.key_algorithm: For each keyword in a set, fetch top-10 SERP URLs. Build a URL co-occurrence matrix. Cluster keywords by Jaccard similarity of their URL sets. Keywords sharing 3+ URLs belong to the same topical cluster.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Additional implementation reference for competitor-analysis. The 3-URL threshold is a useful heuristic for determining cluster membership.

methodology_references.primary_contribution: 20 SEO+GEO skills + 18 influencer skills. CORE-EEAT 80-item benchmark. CITE 40-item benchmark. C-cubed influencer fit scoring (Congruence, Credibility, Conversion potential).
methodology_references.key_algorithm: CITE benchmark for AI citation tracking: Clarity, Indexability, Trust signals, Entity coverage. The 4-dimension model predicts whether a piece of content will be cited by AI search systems.
methodology_references.relevance_to_creator_os: Reference for the GEO/AEO section. The CITE framework aligns with the VideoObject + transcript + chapter marker strategy documented in seo-intelligence-engine.md.

serp_url_overlap_is_gold_standard.finding: SERP-URL-overlap clustering is confirmed as the gold standard for topical content boundary detection, independently implemented in 4+ repos. More reliable than semantic clustering because it reflects Google's actual intent-matching vs. linguistic similarity alone.
serp_url_overlap_is_gold_standard.implication_for_creator_os: The topical-authority-map atom should use SERP-URL-overlap when web-intel retrieval is available, falling back to semantic clustering when not.

paa_depth_4_generates_324_plus_ideas.finding: PAA recursive expansion to depth 4 generates up to 324 question-based video ideas from one seed keyword. Each question is a real searcher intent with verified demand.
paa_depth_4_generates_324_plus_ideas.implication_for_creator_os: The long-tail-expand atom at depth 2 generates 5 to 25 questions per seed. This is the right balance of coverage and manageable output volume.

dual_ranking_strategy.finding: YouTube video + VideoObject schema companion blog post = simultaneous YouTube Search + Google Search ranking. BrightEdge 2025: 53% improved Google ranking for blog posts with YouTube embeds.
dual_ranking_strategy.implication_for_creator_os: The GEO/AEO section of seo-intelligence-engine.md describes this strategy. A geo-optimize atom should scaffold companion blog post content for each hub video.

chapter_markers_enable_ai_citation.finding: Chapter markers in YouTube descriptions unlock YouTube Key Moments in Google Search AND enable AI citation of specific video segments by AI search systems.
chapter_markers_enable_ai_citation.implication_for_creator_os: Every script-section output should include a recommended chapter title for timestamp placement. The video-development workflow should include chapter marker generation.

shorts_freshness_decay_28_to_30_days.finding: YouTube Shorts have a documented freshness decay curve of 28 to 30 days (YouTube official, September 2025). Unlike long-form content, Shorts do not accumulate views over months.
shorts_freshness_decay_28_to_30_days.implication_for_creator_os: Shorts publishing cadence should be planned weekly or bi-weekly, not as one-time evergreen assets. The seasonal-map atom should treat Shorts as point-in-time content, not advance-scheduled like long-form.

geo_aeo_emerging_channel.finding: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and AEO (AI Engine Optimization) have emerged as parallel SEO channels. Tools for tracking AI citations: Goodie AI, HubSpot AI Search Grader, Otterly AI.
geo_aeo_emerging_channel.implication_for_creator_os: A geo-optimize atom should scaffold VideoObject schema annotations, chapter markers, and companion blog post outlines. These directly increase AI citation probability.

hub_hero_help_model_distinct_from_5_pill.finding: The Hub/Hero/Help content pillar model (used across multiple GitHub repos) is a content classification dimension distinct from the creator's 5 content pillars. Hub = comprehensive evergreen; Hero = high-reach aspirational; Help = tutorial and how-to.
hub_hero_help_model_distinct_from_5_pill.implication_for_creator_os: Consider adding Hub/Hero/Help as a secondary classification field in content-strategy and video-development workflows. This dimension informs promotion strategy (Hero gets paid push; Hub gets SEO investment; Help gets tutorial-format optimization).

polished_montages_low_probability.finding: Creator Breakout Kit data: polished lifestyle montages are a low-probability play for new channels. Tutorial, process, and before-and-after content formats have significantly higher click-through and retention than lifestyle aesthetic montages for channels under 10K subscribers.
polished_montages_low_probability.implication_for_creator_os: When video-development recommends format for a new channel, the atom should weight tutorial and transformation formats above aesthetic montage until the channel reaches 10K subscribers.

_currency: watched (data-currency-map.json); refresh from the github-seo-oss-methodology source
